home.subtitle: Original works in coloured pencil on black paper

order.title: Order a reproduction
order.intro: Each reproduction is printed on demand by Nathalie. Average lead time: 2 to 3 weeks.
order.name: Your name
order.note: Nathalie will reply within 48 hours with a quote and payment details.

about.title: About
about.name: Nathalie Żieba
about.bio_1: Since childhood, Nathalie draws what words cannot say. Her works are born in the dark — on black paper, with coloured pencils — as if light had to earn its existence.
about.bio_2: Her universe exists between two impossible scales: the microscopic and the cosmic. Her forms evoke both cells seen under a microscope and nebulae observed through a telescope. In between lies the interior of the human being.
about.bio_3: Each work is a dream captured before forgetting. An anatomy of the invisible.
about.quote: I draw what I see when I close my eyes.
about.contact_text: For any question about the works or reproductions:

how.title: How does it work?
how.subtitle: Each reproduction is a unique piece, printed with care.
how.step1_text: Explore the four collections. When a work moves you, click on "Order a reproduction".
how.step2_text: Multiple formats and paper types available — from A4 to 50×70 cm, matte, satin or Fine Art cotton 300g.
how.step3_text: Nathalie receives your order and oversees each print. Average lead time 2 to 3 weeks, carefully packaged.
how.form_intro: Fill in this form and Nathalie will reply within 48 hours with a detailed quote.
